---
title: "SISOT-R Application Report"
output: pdf_document
params:
  q_ans: params$q_ans
  results_plot: params$results
---

## Reviewer Information

Lorem Ipsum

## Tool Information

Lorem Ipsum

## Table of Answers

params$q_ans

## Results

Lorem Ipsum

```{r, echo = FALSE}
params$q_ans
```


```{r, echo = FALSE}
outplot <- params$results_plot
outplot
```
